expectations.evidence:
# Repository Guidance

- `python3 scripts/check-config.py` - Run after editing anything under `deploy/`.
- `pytest tests/integration/test_sync.py -q` - Run for sync pipeline changes.
- `src/generated/` - Extend generated API clients here instead of hand-writing request/response types.

expectations.text: outputs/repo/AGENTS.md captures the deploy validation command, sync test command, and generated-client rule.

expectations.evidence:
# Repository Guidance

- `python3 scripts/check-config.py` - Run after editing anything under `deploy/`.

expectations.text: outputs/report.md includes Learnings and Applied updates.
expectations.evidence:
## Learnings

Mined from `session_notes.md`:
- `python3 scripts/check-config.py` - Run after editing anything under `deploy/`. (Actionable, non-default command)
- `pytest tests/integration/test_sync.py -q` - Run for sync pipeline changes. (Actionable, non-default command)
- `src/generated/` - Extend generated API clients here instead of hand-writing request/response types. (Actionable code pattern)

Excluded transient noise:
- "The agent opened the README before finding the real files."
- "The user's laptop fan got loud during one test run."

## Applied updates

No `AGENTS.md` existed in the repository. Created `AGENTS.md` at the root with the 3 strongest learnings.
